Bash(SSH_KEY="/Users/navasfazil/Downloads/LightsailDefaultKey-ap-south-1.pem" && SERVER="ubuntu@13.232.249.159" && APP="/var/www/laravel-app" && \\
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i "$SSH_KEY" "$SERVER" "
# Create systemd service for queue worker
sudo tee /etc/systemd/system/laravel-queue.service > /dev/null << CONF
[Unit]
Description=Laravel Queue Worker
After=network.target

[Service]
User=www-data
Group=www-data
Restart=always
RestartSec=5
WorkingDirectory=$APP
ExecStart=/usr/bin/php $APP/artisan queue:work database --sleep=3 --tries=1 --timeout=300 --memory=256

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
CONF

sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl enable laravel-queue
sudo systemctl start laravel-queue
sudo systemctl status laravel-queue --no-pager
" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s -b /dev/null http://localhost:8000/admin/organizer/auction/1/api/poll-state 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys,json
try:
    d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
    print\('Status:', d.get\('auction_status'\)\)
    print\('Available players:', len\(d.get\('available_players',[]\)\)\)
    print\('Current player:', d.get\('current_player',{}\).get\('player',{}\).get\('name'\) if d.get\('current_player'\) else 'None'\)
    print\('Sold players:', len\(d.get\('sold_players',[]\)\)\)
    print\('Teams:', len\(d.get\('teams',[]\)\)\)
    print\('Stats:', d.get\('stats'\)\)
except: print\('Auth redirect \(expected without session\)'\)
" 2>/dev/null)

\)

done
EOF
